final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for a WeChat article about a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a premium/luxury aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with prominent title placement
Subject: must include the fragrance product context as focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source and mood balance is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn color direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium texture treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary)
Constraints: must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio, title must be prominent
Avoid:
